summary: Iteration 42: Admin sidebar simplification and 'Tüm Modüller' page testing completed successfully. All primary test cases passed. Super admin login correctly redirects to /app/admin/dashboard. Sidebar is simplified with core navigation plus dedicated 'Tüm Modüller' catalog. Stats section hidden for admin users. All tested admin routes load without blank screens.

minor.issue: Rate limiting (429) triggered during rapid API testing - not a bug, expected behavior

issues: Console warning about chart width/height being -1 - cosmetic issue, doesn't affect functionality

passed_tests: Admin sidebar shows simplified YÖNETİM section with 8 core links including 'Tüm Modüller'
Sidebar stats (Toplam, Bekleyen, Ciro 7G) hidden for admin users
'Tüm Modüller' page loads at /app/admin/modules with search functionality
'Tüm Modüller' shows 89 total routes, 13 sidebar core, 76 catalog modules
Search in 'Tüm Modüller' filters results correctly (tested 'B2B' -> 14 results)
critical_code_review_comments: redirectByRole.js correctly routes super_admin to /app/admin/dashboard instead of demo surfaces
appNavigation.js ADMIN_NAV_SECTIONS properly defines simplified admin sidebar with 'Tüm Modüller' entry
NewSidebar.jsx correctly hides stats for admin via showStats={!isAdmin} prop
AdminAllModulesPage.jsx provides comprehensive catalog with search, grouped sections, and proper data-testid coverage
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 42 validated admin sidebar simplification. Super admin login redirects to /app/admin/dashboard. Sidebar has ANA MENÜ (5 core items), YÖNETİM (8 items including 'Tüm Modüller'), HESAP (2 items). Stats section hidden for admin. 'Tüm Modüller' catalog at /app/admin/modules lists 89 routes with working search. Clean alias /app/admin/b2b/agency-products works. Rate limiting (429) may occur during rapid testing.

feature_validation_summary.sidebar_simplified: PASS - Shows YÖNETİM section with core links + Tüm Modüller
feature_validation_summary.stats_hidden_for_admin: PASS - Stats section not visible for admin users
feature_validation_summary.tum_moduller_page: PASS - Loads at /app/admin/modules with 89 routes cataloged
